response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, cloud infrastructure, and AI-agent frameworks, with recent work on Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators matching the role's key technologies. However, his background lacks explicit experience with GenAI production systems, vector databases, and RAG architectures, which are critical for this role. His multi-language expertise is valuable but may not substitute for deep AI specialization.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills with TypeScript and Node.js, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work
Proven leadership in designing and maintaining scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz pricing platform)
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and modern DevOps practices (CI/CD, Docker)
concerns: No direct experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or GenAI production systems mentioned
Limited evidence of multi-agent system frameworks (e.g., LangGraph, CrewAI) in his work history
No advanced degree (MS/PhD) in AI or CS, though a BS in Computer Science is held
